2. 用 .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/alpha-feedback.md 提一个 issue

Threadwork is in closed alpha. Before v0.2 we accept issues only, not
PRs. If you see this and still want to submit a PR:

1. Read CONTRIBUTING.md and docs/internal/alpha-beta.md first
2. File an issue using .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/alpha-feedback.md
3. We'll decide via the issue thread whether to take a PR
